languages.text: {n}Меровцы отлично научились выживать во враждебном окружении. При помощи извне они получили и необходимые для этого ресурсы. Их поселения и аванпосты превратились в укрепленные районы, а потери оказались сведены к минимуму.{/n}

{n}The Merovians are well trained to survive in a hostile environment. With outside aid, they had the resources they needed to do so. Their settlements and outposts became fortified areas, and losses were kept to a minimum.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Меровцы отлично научились выживать во враждебном окружении. При помощи извне они получили и необходимые для этого ресурсы. Их поселения и аванпосты превратились в укрепленные районы, а потери оказались сведены к минимуму.{/n}

{n}The Merovians are well trained to survive in a hostile environment. With outside aid, they had the resources they needed to do so. Their settlements and outposts became fortified areas, and losses were kept to a minimum.{/n}

{n}The Merovians are well trained to survive in a hostile environment. With outside aid, they had the resources they needed to do so. Their settlements and outposts became fortified areas, and losses were kept to a minimum.{/n}

languages.text: {n}メロヴィング家は敵対的な環境で生き残るために十分に訓練されていました。外部からの援助によって、彼らは生き残るために必要な資源を手に入れました。彼らの集落や砦は、敵の攻撃から守られるようになりました。損害は最小限に抑えられました。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians are well trained to survive in a hostile environment. With outside aid, they had the resources they needed to do so. Their settlements and outposts became fortified areas, and losses were kept to a minimum.{/n}

traits.locale_text: メロヴィング家は敵対的な環境で生き残るために十分に訓練されていました。外部からの援助によって、彼らは生き残るために必要な資源を手に入れました。彼らの集落や砦は、敵の攻撃から守られるようになりました。損害は最小限に抑えられました。

languages.text: {n}Los merovianos están bien entrenados para sobrevivir en entornos hostiles. Sin ayuda externa, tenían los recursos que necesitaban para ello. Sus asentamientos y puestos avanzados se convirtieron en fortalezas y las pérdidas fueron mínimas.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians are well trained to survive in a hostile environment. With outside aid, they had the resources they needed to do so. Their settlements and outposts became fortified areas, and losses were kept to a minimum.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Los merovianos están bien entrenados para sobrevivir en entornos hostiles. Sin ayuda externa, tenían los recursos que necesitaban para ello. Sus asentamientos y puestos avanzados se convirtieron en fortalezas y las pérdidas fueron mínimas.{/n}

languages.text: {n}梅罗夫人训练有素，惯于在恶劣环境下生存。借助外部补给，他们获得了防卫所需的全部资源。定居点与前哨站化为一座座要塞，人员损失控制到了最低。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians are well trained to survive in a hostile environment. With outside aid, they had the resources they needed to do so. Their settlements and outposts became fortified areas, and losses were kept to a minimum.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}梅罗夫人训练有素，惯于在恶劣环境下生存。借助外部补给，他们获得了防卫所需的全部资源。定居点与前哨站化为一座座要塞，人员损失控制到了最低。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Merovianer sind darauf trainiert, in einer feindseligen Umgebung zu überleben. Mit Hilfe von außen hatten sie die Ressourcen, die sie dazu brauchten. Ihre Siedlungen und Außenposten wurden zu Festungen, ihre Verluste minimiert.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians are well trained to survive in a hostile environment. With outside aid, they had the resources they needed to do so. Their settlements and outposts became fortified areas, and losses were kept to a minimum.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Merovianer sind darauf trainiert, in einer feindseligen Umgebung zu überleben. Mit Hilfe von außen hatten sie die Ressourcen, die sie dazu brauchten. Ihre Siedlungen und Außenposten wurden zu Festungen, ihre Verluste minimiert.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Merovlular, düşmancıl ortamlarda hayatta kalmak üzere eğitilmiştir. Dış yardım sayesinde bunu yapmak için ihtiyaç duydukları kaynaklara sahip oldular. Yerleşimleri ve karakolları müstahkem bölgeler hâline geldi, kayıplar minimumda tutuldu.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians are well trained to survive in a hostile environment. With outside aid, they had the resources they needed to do so. Their settlements and outposts became fortified areas, and losses were kept to a minimum.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Merovlular, düşmancıl ortamlarda hayatta kalmak üzere eğitilmiştir. Dış yardım sayesinde bunu yapmak için ihtiyaç duydukları kaynaklara sahip oldular. Yerleşimleri ve karakolları müstahkem bölgeler hâline geldi, kayıplar minimumda tutuldu.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les Meroviens étaient entraînés à survivre en environnement hostile, et avec l'aide de l'extérieur, ils disposaient de ressources suffisantes pour subsister. Grâce à la fortification de leurs bases et avant-postes, les pertes furent minimes.{/n}
